blocks.text: Title week ignites: Madrid must win, City three points back
Man City's 2-1 win over Arsenal on Sunday sliced the PL gap to three points. Wednesday's trip to Burnley looms large — but City face it without their midfield chief.
⚽ 19:00 — Valencia vs Mallorca, relegation six-pointer for two clubs in real danger

blocks.label: ⚽ Wednesday's title doubles
items: Man City at Burnley 21:00 — PL gap just 3pts, City without midfield chief
Barcelona vs Celta Vigo 21:30 — Barça can stretch La Liga lead to 12pts
